Event Branding & Social Media

International
Women's Day
2026

Full event brand identity for Mega We Care Ghana in partnership with the Ministry of Health and the Medical Women's Association of Ghana (MWAG). Theme: Give To Gain.

Event Branding Print Collateral Social Media Ghana — March 2026

Client

Mega We Care Ghana

Partners

MoH Ghana & MWAG

Deliverables

Brand & Print & Social

Date

8th March 2026

The Brief

A celebration rooted in health & sisterhood

Mega We Care Ghana wanted to mark International Women's Day with an event that did more than celebrate — it needed to activate its women's health product range (Fenza, ENAT 400, MaxCal, Ginsomineve) in a way that felt warm, empowering, and Ghanaian.

The event was co-hosted with the Ministry of Health Ghana and the Medical Women's Association of Ghana (MWAG), raising the stakes for the visual identity: it had to carry institutional weight while still feeling joyful and community-centred.

Design System

Colour, type & deliverables

Colour Palette

Hot pink energy, violet depth, teal freshness — a palette built to feel festive, feminine, and alive on both print and screen.

Typography

Women's Day

Script display type for the headline gives the identity warmth and elegance. Clean sans-serif for event details maintains legibility at distance.

Deliverables

  • Event backdrop / step-and-repeat banner
  • Photo booth frame prop (printed cutout)
  • Product butterfly motif — Fenza, ENAT 400, MaxCal, Ginsomineve
  • Branded gift bags
  • Podium signage & standees
  • Social media content for @mega_we_care_gh
  • Balloon arch colour direction (pink, violet, teal)

Event Photography

Branding in the wild

Photo booth frame — product butterfly motif
Event backdrop with balloon arch installation
Frame design detail — Give To Gain
MWAG members at the photo booth
Frame in context — speaker session
Prize giving — branded gift bags
Prize giving — product standee background

Impact & Outcomes

Branding that worked

  • 3 Institutional partners brought under one cohesive visual identity — Mega We Care, Ministry of Health Ghana, and MWAG.
  • 4 Women's health products activated through the butterfly motif — Fenza, ENAT 400, MaxCal, and Ginsomineve.
  • ∞ Photo booth frames shared organically on social media — every attendee photo a piece of branded content for @mega_we_care_gh.
